_note: Kenya public holidays 2026 + known iTax downtime patterns. Used by deadline_calculator.
holiday_rule: If a public holiday falls on a Sunday, the following Monday is observed as a holiday.

itax_known_downtime.pattern: iTax often goes down for maintenance on weekends, especially end-of-month weekends and during filing rush periods (June, January).
itax_known_downtime.note: Always file 3 days before the deadline to account for iTax downtime.

income_tax_resident.note: 30 June of the year following the tax year

income_tax_corporate.note: 6th month after end of accounting period

weekend_rule: If deadline falls on Saturday or Sunday, the next working day applies. If it falls on a public holiday, the next working day applies.
